behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, component names, type names, shortcut keys, locale keys, and literal strings asserted in tests are explicitly mentioned in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what components/exports/labels are needed but doesn't dictate exact implementation code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on specific literal text like 'export const settingsIcon', 'DropdownMenu.ItemCheckbox = DropdownMenuItemCheckbox', and 'export type DropdownMenuItemProps' — alternative valid implementations (e.g., default export with re-export, type aliases) would fail these string-match checks.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include actual unit test runs (yarn test:app) for DropdownMenu.test.tsx, shortcuts.test.tsx, DefaultSidebar.test.tsx, plus typecheck/eslint/prettier, not just text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check for multiple specific strings, JSON content, and run actual test suites and typecheck, which a stub couldn't pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all requirements listed in instruction.md: checkbox component, type export, icon, shortcut, Preferences component, locale, integration.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively by feature area (e.g., test_settings_icon_exists, test_preferences_component_exists) with docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: JSON locale keys and exact values ('Preferences', 'Tool lock') are specified in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: File paths and names are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files because their modification is the task; does not over-specify buggy lines.
